exportAllPoint1: The data will be sent to your registered email in a downloadable file and downloaded to your computer.
exportAllPoint2: Processing may take some time. You'll be notified when it's ready.
exportAllSuccess: Your export is on its way!
deleteAllChatsDescription: Delete all messages and conversations permanently
deleteAllChatsPoint1: All messages and conversations will be deleted permanently.
deleteAccountPoint1: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteAccountPoint2: Your data will be permanently deleted within 30 days.
deleteAccountPoint3: You will be required to create a new account using the same email address to access {brandName} services again.
deleteAccountProceed: To confirm, type "DELETE" and click "Confirm" below.
terminateSessionsDescription: Log out from all connected devices
terminateSessionsBody: Are you sure you want to sign out of all sessions? This will also sign you out of your current device or browser.
changePinDescription: Update login PIN to keep your account secure
personalizationInfo: This information will be shared with the assistant.
personalityDescription: Set the style and tone when responding with any AI.
policyViolationError: Content violates corporate policies. Please ensure your input is appropriate.
sharepointDescription: Upload Microsoft Word, Excel, Document and other files, including those from SharePoint.
oneDriveDescription: Upload Microsoft Word, Excel, Document and other files.
googleDriveDescription: Upload Google Docs, Sheets, Slides and other files.
disconnectPoint2: Any custom agents relying on files from this app for their knowledge will lose access and may stop functioning.
disconnectPoint3: You can reconnect to this app via the integrations settings or from the custom agent's settings.
